title: webfetch-tool config
description: Configuration for webfetch-tool extension. Project config: .pi/extensions/webfetch-tool.json. Global config: ~/.pi/agent/extensions/webfetch-tool.json

$schema.description: Optional JSON schema URI for editor validation.

conversionModel.description: Model reference in provider/model form (for example: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5).

htmlPreprocessor.description: HTML preprocessing engine used before markdown conversion.

strictSafety.description: Block high-risk content in safe_markdown mode.

defaultMode.description: Default mode used when tool call omits mode.
